title: Enhancing Power BI with Copilot
summary: Copilot in Power BI streamlines data modeling and report-building through intelligent suggestions, natural language query generation, and context-aware insights. Developers can describe desired outcomes in plain English and Copilot will generate DAX formulas, visuals, and entire report structures.

title: BRSSUG Monthly Meeting
summary: Join us for the next BRSSUG monthly meeting at Jones Creek Regional Library. Session details and speaker info will be posted on Meetup closer to the event.
